appraisal_events.evidence: « Vous n'êtes pas de votre temps … je vous en félicite … Des efforts tels que les vôtres devraient être encouragés si nous avions un gouvernement. »; Son « amabilité », son air de se mettre « en complicité » avec Bloch flattaient sa vanité.
appraisal_events.explanation: Norpois flatters Bloch by congratulating him as above his age and aligning himself rhetorically with him, which locally elevates Bloch and makes him feel exceptional.

status_effects.explanation: Bloch receives explicit commendation for his disinterested studies and feels singled out as exceptional, which raises his local standing.
By dispensing flattering praise while keeping his own views opaque, Norpois maintains conversational control and creates a sense of complicity.
